expectations.evidence: CSV report contains rows numbered 1 through 33, each with a KWCAG item name, verdict, and verdict method. All 33 items are present.

expectations.text: Detected div onClick without keyboard accessibility
expectations.evidence: Item 10 (키보드 사용 보장) reports: '<div onClick={handleClick}> with tabIndex:-1, Tab 포커스 불가, onKeyDown 핸들러 없음' — verdict ❌.

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id='stat-card' when rendered in a list
expectations.evidence: Item 32 (마크업 오류 방지) reports: 'id="stat-card" 하드코딩. 3회 렌더링 시 동일 id 3개 생성. Playwright: duplicates=["stat-card"]' — verdict ❌.

expectations.text: Each issue is mapped to a specific KWCAG item number
expectations.evidence: All detected issues are mapped to numbered KWCAG items: 10 (키보드 사용 보장), 11 (초점 이동과 표시), 23 (레이블과 네임), 32 (마크업 오류 방지), 33 (웹 애플리케이션 접근성).

expectations.text: Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
expectations.evidence: All failing/warning items include fix recommendations in the '수정 가이드' column: item 10 suggests <button> replacement or tabIndex+role+onKeyDown, item 23 suggests aria-label, item 32 suggests dynamic id, item 33 suggests role='button'+aria-label, item 11 suggests focus styles.

expectations.text: Lighthouse-mapped items show verdict method as Lighthouse when dev server is running
expectations.evidence: Items 1, 8, 17, 18, 19, 25, 29 all show 'Lighthouse' as their verdict method (판정방식) in both CSV and HTML reports.

expectations.text: Browser-target items (A-10) show verdict method as Playwright when dev server is running
expectations.evidence: Item 10 (키보드 사용 보장) shows 'Playwright' as verdict method. Additional browser-verified items 11, 23, 32, 33 also show 'Playwright'.
